case_title: A ONE IMPORTS VS. AGNETTA Q. ASHLEY

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE TO ALLOW MORE TIME FOR SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF A ONE IMPORTS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-07-2017 - CONTINUED TO AUG-25-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED FIVE DAYS PRIOR TO THE HEARING. NO FURTHER PROOF OF SERVICE IS REQUIRED.
